emails.subject: Congratulations
emails.body: Congratulations on your promotion! I'm very happy for you. It's good to see the recognition for leadership in commercial support roles. Regards, Susan

emails.subject: Congratulations
emails.body: Congratulations on your promotion! I'm very happy for you. It's good to see the recognition for leadership in commercial support roles. Regards, Susan

emails.subject: Congratulations

emails.subject: Re: Congratulations
emails.body: Re: Congratulations Thanks for your nice note. I hope that everyone in the group sees this as a recognition of the value of the role that we play within Enron. That will help us in attracting and retaining talented people, which makes my job easier and more fun. --Sally Susan Harrison 01/16/2001 12:14 PM
